title: Craft a Product Description for a High-End Fitness Tracker
scenario: The goal is to create a compelling product description for an upcoming fitness tracker that targets high-end customers. It should highlight the device's advanced features, sleek design, and durability. The description should be under 120 words, written in a professional tone, and include at least three key benefits. Consider the target audience's interests, such as wellness, technology, and style.
constraints: Must include the brand name and device model
Should emphasize the device's water resistance and GPS capabilities

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the given constraints.
Evaluate the tone of the product description, ensuring it is professional and appealing to high-end customers.
Verify that the description highlights at least three key benefits of the device.
Check if the product description is under 120 words.
